Short-Term Crypto Sentiment Responds to Political Remarks
Bitcoin and Ethereum saw a temporary ~3% lift after positive sentiment from Trump’s recent political address. This demonstrates how political narratives can influence crypto short-term psychology, even amid macro stress.

If you invested $10k when Trump took office, you would have:

BTC → $6,050
ETH → $4,510
XRP → $4,180
LINK → $3,725
SOL → $2,930
DOGE → $2,300
ADA → $2,340
AVAX → $2,120
DOT → $1,770
TRUMP → $505
MELANIA → $100

We are tired of winning Mr President
